        <vsys>
          <entry name="vsys1">
            <display-name>Root</display-name>
            <shared-policy-status>Out of Sync</shared-policy-status>
            <shared-policy-md5sum>xyz789uvw012</shared-policy-md5sum>
          </entry>
        </vsys>
      </entry>
      <entry name="FW-TOKYO">
        <serial>FW-TOKYO</serial>
        <connected>no</connected>
        <hostname>fw-tokyo.example.com</hostname>
        <ip-address>192.168.1.3</ip-address>
        <model>PA-VM</model>
        <sw-version>10.1.1</sw-version>
        <certificate-status>Expired</certificate-status>
        <certificate-subject-name>CN=fw-tokyo.example.com,O=Palo Alto Networks</certificate-subject-name>
        <certificate-expiry>Jan 10, 2024</certificate-expiry>
        <custom-certificate-usage>No</custom-certificate-usage>
        <ha>
          <state>unknown</state>
          <peer>
            <serial>unknown</serial>
          </peer>
        </ha>
        <vsys>
          <entry name="vsys1">
            <display-name>Root</display-name>
            <shared-policy-status>unknown</shared-policy-status>
            <shared-policy-md5sum/>
          </entry>
        </vsys>
      </entry>
    </devices>
  </result>
</response>
responses.label: LIST PANORAMA FIREWALL

responses.body:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<response status="success">
  <result>
    <template>
      <entry name="template-prod">
        <description>Production Template</description>
        <devices>
          <entry name="FW-NYC"/>
          <entry name="FW-LONDON"/>
        </devices>
      </entry>
      <entry name="template-dev">
        <description>Development Template</description>
        <devices>
          <entry name="FW-TOKYO"/>
        </devices>
      </entry>
    </template>
  </result>
</response>
responses.label: LIST PANORAMA TEMPLATES
